prompt: The board is connected and blocker context sharpens an already strong pressure story. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Blockers should refine the read only after the connected-board pressure is already strong enough to support a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The connected texture plus helpful blocker context supports a raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the board texture first, then use blockers to refine the choice.
